data.text/markdown:

data.text/markdown:
Useful scratch queries

Duplicate a SQL cell above and try one of these filters: 
WHERE title LIKE '%City Hall%'
WHERE circa_year BETWEEN 1900 AND 1920
WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL
WHERE last_error IS NOT NULL
